description: Curated list of TVS game assemblies to copy for mod development

managedAssemblies.name: UnityEngine.AssetBundleModule.dll
managedAssemblies.description: Unity types related to AssetBundle handling; commonly needed for mods that load their own assets

managedAssemblies.name: UnityEngine.UI.dll
managedAssemblies.description: Unity UI types; may be needed for mods that interact with the game's UI

notes: Start with Assembly-CSharp as the baseline for most mods.
Add additional assemblies here as mod requirements dictate.
The setup script will warn if required assemblies are missing after copy.
Optional assemblies are skipped silently if not found in the game folder.
